name: eBay Sales Orders
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Import eBay Sales Orders"}], "data-id": "1"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Automatic order downloads are disabled by default. To switch them on go to "}, {"text": "eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Setup & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": " and clear the "}, {"text": "Enable Manual eBay Order Management", "bold": true}, {"text": " checkbox."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Ordinarily, all sales are marked as paid and shipped automatically by Neto once the payment has been received and sale has been processed. If for any reason, you need to do this manually:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Mark Paid or Shipped Manually"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Transactions", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Filter by the "}, {"text": "Transaction Number", "bold": true}, {"text": "/"}, {"text": "eBay Username", "bold": true}, {"text": " etc."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the order and "}, {"text": "With x Selected", "bold": true}, {"text": " either "}, {"text": "Mark As Paid", "bold": true}, {"text": " or "}, {"text": "Mark As Shipped", "bold": true}, {"text": " as required."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/eBaySalesOrders1.05T5g00000v4MaJEAU.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/eBaySalesOrders1.05T5g00000v4MaJEAU.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image1", "width": 700, "height": 241}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Incomplete Transactions"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If your customer has not completed checkout through eBay (ie. no shipping has been calculated or no payment method has been selected), the order will not be imported into Neto. Only the record of the listing sale is listed. To search for incomplete checkouts:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Transactions", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Filter by "}, {"text": "Checkout Incomplete", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/eBaySalesOrders2.05T5g00000v4OaLEAU.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/eBaySalesOrders2.05T5g00000v4OaLEAU.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image2", "width": 700, "height": 241}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you have open disputes, you may want to include the "}, {"text": "Checkout Status", "bold": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "Seller Responded", "bold": true}, {"text": ", which will also return incomplete transactions that have issues. "}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Cancel an eBay Sales Order"}], "data-id": "2"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you need to cancel an eBay order for any reason there are different steps you need to perform within Neto and on eBay. eBay allows transaction cancelling for reasons including item is broken or you made a mistake when listing the item."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Cancel in Neto"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If the order has been downloaded from eBay into Neto you will need to cancel the order and any linked payments. To cancel a sales order, follow the steps in "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1446-cancel-or-delete-a-sales-order", "children": [{"text": "this article"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Cancelling in Neto will NOT cancel the transaction on eBay, so you will need to complete the steps in the next section as well."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Cancel on eBay"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When you need to cancel a transaction, it's generally a good practice to first contact your buyer to let them know you're cancelling the transaction and why."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "eBay has rules around when you can and can't cancel a transaction. For the criteria and steps to cancel a transaction, see eBay's instructions "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.ebay.com.au/help/selling/getting-paid/cancelling-transaction?id=4136", "children": [{"text": "here"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "eBay lets the buyer know that you've cancelled the transaction. If the buyer has already paid for the item, you will need to refund the buyer."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Refund the Buyer"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once you've cancelled a transaction, it's time to refund the buyer. If the buyer paid with PayPal:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The buyer's PayPal account is automatically refunded. eBay then either asks PayPal to remove the refund amount from your PayPal account or place the amount on your seller invoice."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Once the buyer has been refunded, eBay considers the cancellation to be complete."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If the buyer paid with a method other than PayPal:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You have 10 business days to refund the buyer's original payment method."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Once you issue the refund, eBay asks the buyer to let them know that they received it."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The buyer confirms they received the refund."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The buyer doesn't respond to eBay's request to confirm receipt of the refund after 10 business days."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "eBay consider the cancellation to be complete when:"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If you haven't issued the refund within 10 business days, the buyer can open an eBay Money Back Guarantee request for an item that wasn't received."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Receive a Final Value Fee Credit"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The cancellation must be complete for you to receive a final value fee credit. The cancellation request is complete when:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The buyer's PayPal account is refunded, if the buyer paid with PayPal."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The buyer confirms they received their refund, if the buyer paid with a method other than PayPal."}]}]}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "eBay credit the final value fee to your account 7-10 days after the cancellation is complete. "}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If you'd like your credit refunded to you, you can "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://pages.ebay.com.au/help/sell/refunds.html", "children": [{"text": "request a refund of your eBay credit balance"}]}, {"text": "."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "eBay Disputes"}], "data-id": "3"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Disputes can only be opened after four days to give the customer time to complete the transaction."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "This process can be automated using "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.ebay.com.au/help/selling/getting-paid/resolving-unpaid-items?id=4137", "children": [{"text": "eBay's Unpaid Item Assistant"}]}, {"text": " which will create and close unpaid item cases for you. You also need to turn on the "}, {"text": "Auto release eBay disputed transaction", "bold": true}, {"text": " setting in "}, {"text": "eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Setup & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Create a Dispute In Neto"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Transactions", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Using the advanced filters set the page to show transactions "}, {"text": "Not Yet Marked As Paid", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Apply", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "height": 241}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the "}, {"text": "Transactions", "bold": true}, {"text": " you wish to create disputes for by using the checkboxes on the left side of the page, and when complete select "}, {"text": "Bulk Create eBay Disputes", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "height": 241}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You will now be able to review and select a "}, {"text": "Dispute Reason", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Dispute Explanation", "bold": true}, {"text": " using the drop down boxes."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": receive confirmation that the dispute has been opened."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Disputes can only be closed through the eBay site to allow you to review communications with the buyer."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Release Committed Stock"}], "data-id": "4"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Stock may need to be released from an eBay order if the transaction is incomplete. To release stock you can open an unpaid item dispute in eBay, and upon dispute closure the stock will be released automatically."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To release stock manually:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Transactions", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Find the incomplete transaction using search filters."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the relevant transactions and at bottom of page click the "}, {"text": "Bulk Release Reserve Stock", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/eBaySalesOrders6.05T5g00000v4Ow2EAE.png", "embedData": {"url": "height": 98}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Alternatively you can find these transactions on the product by going to 'Stock Control' and selecting 'eBay Transactions' and reviewing all the committed stock from here."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/eBaySalesOrders7.05T5g00000v4OyHEAU.png", "embedData": {"url": "height": 75}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Returns and Refunds"}], "data-id": "returns"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Returns must be raised in both eBay and in Neto. Instructions to manage returns in eBay can be found "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.ebay.com.au/help/selling/managing-returns-refunds/handling-return-requests?id=4115", "children": [{"text": "here"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You then need to process the return in Neto. Complete the steps in the "}, {"text": "Create and Process a Return Merchandise Authorisation"}, {"text": " article."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "An RMA (Return Merchandise Authorisation) is a numbered authorisation provided by a mail-order merchant to permit the return of a product."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "By creating an RMA, you are able to:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Track the progress of a return through Neto"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Credit the customer if required and"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Take the appropriate action against the stock item (i.e. return the item to stock, write off etc)."}]}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/eBaySalesOrders8.05T5g00000v4PfGEAU.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/eBaySalesOrders8.05T5g00000v4PfGEAU.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image8", "width": 700, "height": 245}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once you've completed both the eBay and Neto steps, your return will be complete. Refunds through PayPal will automatically be completed, other payment methods must be manually processed."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Missing Sales Orders"}], "data-id": "missing"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Orders that are dispatched through eBay will not create an order in Neto. This is to prevent double handling, and the order being sent twice to the buyer. We recommend creating the order manually from the transaction, so that stock and accounting systems can balance correctly. To create a sales order from the eBay transaction:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto  control panel, navigate to "}, {"text": "eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Transactions", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Checkout Status - Checkout Complete"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Order Not Yet Created"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Shipped to Customer on eBay"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Expand the filters and select:"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Apply", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and you'll see a list of eBay transactions that have been paid, shipped, but with no order in eBay. Click on the eBay order # link to open the order."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/eBaySalesOrders9.05T5g00000v4NuuEAE.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/eBaySalesOrders9.05T5g00000v4NuuEAE.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image9", "width": 700, "height": 236}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Create Order", "bold": true}, {"text": " link. Confirm by clicking "}, {"text": "Ok", "bold": true}, {"text": " in the pop-up window."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/eBaySalesOrders10.05T5g00000v4PijEAE.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/eBaySalesOrders10.05T5g00000v4PijEAE.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image10", "width": 700, "height": 236}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Your order will be created, and the order number will appear at the top of the screen. Navigate to "}, {"text": "Sales orders", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "View orders", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Expand the filters and change the "}, {"text": "Empty Orders", "bold": true}, {"text": " filter to "}, {"text": "Only show empty orders", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Click the "}, {"text": "Apply", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open the order you created from the eBay transaction, and add the orderlines."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Dispatch", "bold": true}, {"text": " button, and the order will be marked as dispatched."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Troubleshoot Sales Orders"}], "data-id": "5"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If eBay sales This renews the token. Repeat these steps for the authentication token too, for good measure."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Orders should begin downloading to Neto and updating on eBay within five minutes."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Check your Batch Processes"}], "data-id": "7"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate "}, {"text": "eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Pending", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "This process is also relevant to running processes ("}, {"text": "eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Running", "bold": true}, {"text": ")."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Examine the "}, {"text": "Date Started", "bold": true}, {"text": " for each listed process."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If the process is taking too long (e.g. hours or days) or there are too many processes, highlight all the processes and click the "}, {"text": "Stop Selected", "bold": true}, {"text": " button. "16"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The most common cause for missing sales orders is when they have already been marked dispatched in eBay. Neto won't download these sales orders automatically to prevent multiple items being shipped to the customer. If you still can't find your sales order in the orders list, first check the filter that allows you to see empty orders."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You may also have an expired "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1087-manage-your-ebay-integration#3", "children": [{"text": "setup token"}]}, {"text": ". These tokens need to be renewed every 18 months or so."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Orders that aren't paid for on eBay (cash on pickup, bank deposit, cheque) will not download to Neto. In your control panel, navigate to eBay > Transactions and find the transaction. Mark the transaction as paid, and the order will be updated in eBay as transaction complete. The order will then download into Neto."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Empty Sales Orders"}], "data-id": "17"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If an eBay sales orders has no orderlines, it's usually because it was manually created in the control panel from the eBay transaction. Sales orders aren't created automatically when the order has been dispatched through eBay to prevent multiple orders being sent."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To ensure your stock is updated as required, add the orderline to the order, and mark it as shipped. Ensure the price matches the price paid by the customer on eBay, and that the option to not send an invoice is enabled, as an invoice would have been sent from eBay if the order was processed on eBay. Then dispatch the order without creating a consignment."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Fraud Score 99"}], "data-id": "18"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "eBay orders with a fraud score of 99 will usually be accompanied with the message "}, {"text": "IMPORTANT! eBay Order #XXXX has a refund on eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": ". This means that the buyer has cancelled their order during the 1 hour cooling off period."}]}]
